goal: Establish all prerequisite event definitions, database migration, and enum values needed by GL handlers and publishers

tasks.name: Create PenaltyWaivedEvent + enrich LoanReversalEvent
tasks.action: Create PenaltyWaivedEvent record (penaltyId, memberId, amount, reason, actor) implementing AuditableEvent. Add penaltyPortion BigDecimal field to LoanReversalEvent after interestPortion.

tasks.name: Liquibase migration for Bad Debt Expense + TransactionType enum
tasks.action: Create changeset 005-seed-bad-debt-expense.yaml inserting account 5003 Bad Debt Expense (EXPENSE). Add LOAN_REVERSAL, CONTRIBUTION_REVERSAL, PENALTY_WAIVER, BENEFIT_DISTRIBUTION to TransactionType enum. Register in changelog master.

tasks.name: Create lifecycle event records
tasks.action: Create 4 minimal audit-only event records implementing AuditableEvent: LoanApplicationEvent, LoanStatusChangeEvent, ContributionCreatedEvent, PayoutStatusChangeEvent. Keep payloads minimal.

commitMessage: feat(event-gl-completeness): add event records, Liquibase migration, and TransactionType values
